notes: NIL TAF with aerodrome geo metadata.

reports.iwxxm_xml:
<ns0:TAF xmlns:ns0="http://icao.int/iwxxm/2025-2" xmlns:ns2="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:ns3="http://www.aixm.aero/schema/5.1.1" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://icao.int/iwxxm/2025-2 https://schemas.wmo.int/iwxxm/2025-2RC1/iwxxm.xsd" reportStatus="NORMAL" permissibleUsage="OPERATIONAL" ns2:id="uuid.00000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000001">
  <ns0:issueTime>
    <ns2:TimeInstant ns2:id="uuid.00000002-0000-4000-8000-000000000002">
      <ns2:timePosition>2026-03-07T20:00:00Z</ns2:timePosition>
    </ns2:TimeInstant>
  </ns0:issueTime>
  <ns0:aerodrome>
    <ns3:AirportHeliport ns2:id="uuid.00000003-0000-4000-8000-000000000003">
      <ns3:timeSlice>
        <ns3:AirportHeliportTimeSlice ns2:id="uuid.00000004-0000-4000-8000-000000000004">
          <ns2:validTime />
          <ns3:interpretation>SNAPSHOT</ns3:interpretation>
          <ns3:name>AFONSOS ARPT MI</ns3:name>
          <ns3:locationIndicatorICAO>SBAF</ns3:locationIndicatorICAO>
          <ns3:ARP>
            <ns3:ElevatedPoint srsDimension="2" srsName="http://www.opengis.net/def/crs/EPSG/0/4326" axisLabels="Lat Long" ns2:id="uuid.00000005-0000-4000-8000-000000000005">
              <ns2:pos>-22.87 -43.37</ns2:pos>
            </ns3:ElevatedPoint>
          </ns3:ARP>
        </ns3:AirportHeliportTimeSlice>
      </ns3:timeSlice>
    </ns3:AirportHeliport>
  </ns0:aerodrome>
  <ns0:baseForecast nilReason="http://codes.wmo.int/common/nil/missing" />
</ns0:TAF>
